summary: I wrote the declared output `business_requirements` to `.pipeliner/phases/01-define/main/requirements-writer/output/requirements.md`, containing fifteen atomic, numbered business requirements (R1–R15) in "When X happens, Y should happen" form for the live pipeline status summary. Since the step's input.json (iteration 3) contained no resolved discovery notes or feedback, I derived the requirements from the ask alone and noted that in the artifact. The requirements cover: a single prominent plain-language summary per pipeline; specific message content for active steps (phase, step, activity, iteration), human-approval gates, waiting-for-worker, phase transitions, concurrent steps, completion, and failure states; live self-updating behavior without page refresh; accuracy on page load; per-pipeline independence; minimal on-screen disruption when updating; understandability without relying on color; and preservation of the existing per-step cards. All language is non-technical as required.
